ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the measurement station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "owner_organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization responsible for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the device is used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement device (e.g., thermometer, barometer) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_devices_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for the measurement */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded during the measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure recorded during the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES measurement_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement entry being processed */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., copy, modify, remove) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_operations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
